stemHtml: Under radar control in IMC, you reach the cleared altitude 8 NM before a compulsory reporting point, then suffer radio failure. How long must you maintain the last assigned altitude?

options.a: 12 minutes from reaching the last cleared altitude.
options.b: 10 minutes from setting the SSR code.
options.c: 20 minutes from the time you fail to report at the compulsory point.
options.d: 12 minutes from setting the SSR code.
